questions: best mobile banking apps ki ki?
answers: Mobile banking allows you to manage your bank account, transfer money, pay bills, and check balances directly from your smartphone through your bank's app.
Mobile banking holo phone er app diye bank er shob kaj kora - taka pathano, balance check, bill pay, ar account manage kora ghore boshe.
Mobile banking is generally safe with encryption, biometric login, and two-factor authentication, but always use secure networks and keep your app updated for best security.
Mobile banking advantages include 24/7 access, instant transfers, bill payments, mobile check deposits, real-time notifications, and no need to visit a physical bank branch.
